docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CHANGE OF PLAINTIFFS ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERROTTA, MICHAEL VINCENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL PERROTTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIJAY VASUDEVAN IA PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VASUDEVAN, VIJAY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-07-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL PERROTTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIJAY VASUDEVAN IA PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY PERROTTA, MICHAEL VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT VASUDEVAN, VIJAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERROTTA, MICHAEL VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASUDEVAN, VIJAY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
